message:
feat(conformance): add locale, resource, and termios ops conformance tests

Expand the frankenlibc conformance test suite with three new test modules
that validate POSIX-compatible behavior for previously untested syscall
families:

- locale_ops_conformance_test: covers setlocale/localeconv/nl_langinfo
  behavior including LC_* category interactions and default "C" locale
  invariants
- resource_ops_conformance_test: covers getrlimit/setrlimit/getrusage
  including RLIMIT_NOFILE, RLIMIT_STACK boundary conditions and
  resource usage counter monotonicity
- termios_ops_conformance_test: covers tcgetattr/tcsetattr/cfgetispeed/
  cfsetospeed including baud rate round-trip fidelity and c_cflag
  manipulation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
